## Cerebras Systems Assessed as Fairly Valued with Weak Book Value Support

Cerebras is a key wafer-scale AI compute alternative to NVDA; a 'fairly valued / weak book value' read suggests limited near-term price catalyst absent a fundamental inflection such as a major design win or partnership. Relevant context for sizing CBRS as an alternative AI compute position.

- A valuation analysis concludes CBRS stock looks fairly valued at current levels.
- Weak book value is cited as a limiting factor in the valuation support case.
- Framing is neutral-to-cautious on near-term upside.
- Single-outlet note with no sell-side rating or institutional catalyst cited.
